title: Spy on Throne
content: Reveals information about a target province including resources, military, buildings, and other available intelligence.

title: Survey
content: Reveals building distribution and efficiency information for a target province.

title: Spy on Military
content: Reveals military composition and strength of a target province.

title: Nightstrike
content: Kills enemy offensive military units using thieves. Useful before coordinated attacks to reduce enemy offense.

title: Assassinate Wizards
content: Removes enemy wizards and weakens magical capability.

title: Rob the Vaults
content: Steals gold from a target province using thieves.

title: Kidnap
content: Steals peasants from a target province, reducing population.

title: Propaganda
content: Reduces enemy honor through thievery operations.

title: Spy on Throne
content: Intel operation that reveals province information including resources, military, buildings, and other details depending on success.

title: Spy on Military
content: Intel operation that reveals the military composition of a target province.

title: Survey
content: Intel operation that reveals building distribution and efficiency information for a target province.

title: Nightstrike
content: Sabotage operation that kills enemy offensive military units using thieves. Useful before coordinated attacks to reduce enemy offense.

title: Assassinate Wizards
content: Sabotage operation that removes enemy wizards and weakens magical strength.

title: Kidnap
content: Thievery operation that steals peasants from a target province.

title: Rob the Vaults
content: Thievery operation that steals gold from a target province.

title: Propaganda
content: Thievery operation that damages enemy honor.

title: Traditional March
content: Standard attack used to take land from an enemy province. A primary attack type during wars and coordinated waves.

title: Ambush
content: Attack action used to counter a previous land attack and recover lost land.

title: Massacre
content: Attack focused on killing enemy population and weakening province strength.

title: Raze
content: Attack focused on destroying enemy land and buildings instead of gaining acres.

title: Plunder
content: Attack focused on stealing resources from an enemy province.

title: Learn
content: Attack focused on gaining knowledge from an enemy province.
